hero_slides.title: Crafted for Your Celebration
hero_slides.subtitle: Handcrafted art jewellery from Mumbai — where every piece tells a story.

testimonials.name: Priya Mehta
testimonials.text: Absolutely stunning bridal set! The quality is exceptional and the craftsmanship is unparalleled. Got so many compliments on my wedding day.

testimonials.name: Anjali Sharma
testimonials.text: Ordered the choker necklace set and it arrived beautifully packaged. The antique gold finish is exactly as shown. Will definitely order again!

testimonials.name: Sneha Patel
testimonials.text: The customer service is wonderful and the jewellery is breathtaking. My sangeet look was perfect thanks to Ria Art Jewellery.
